security.title: Two-Factor Authentication
security.scanQr: Scan this QR code with Google Authenticator, Authy, or 1Password
security.enterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your app
security.saveCodesWarning: Save these recovery codes in a safe place. They are shown only once. Each code can be used only one time to log in if you lose access to your authenticator app.

security.regenerateWarning: This will invalidate your existing recovery codes and generate a new set of 8.
